title: ByeByeSky
description: A ressource-pack that remove the sun, the moon and the cloud from the cloud for a cleanny look :d
body:
# 🤯 ByeByeSky
*Completele disable the sun, the moon and the clouds textures*

# 📚 Installation
This ressource pack is first made for mods/modpacks/datapacks maker that need the aesthetic. You can merge the `environement` folder of this ressource pack to anything and the sun, the moon and the clouds textures will be removed, even with clouds activated in video settings.

# 🖨️ License
This ressource pack is under the [Unlisence](https://unlicense.org/), so you are free to do anything with this pack !

If you want to support my work, grab a donation site here -->

Thanks <3
